Klein Moretti.hair_style: medium-length, slightly tousled and swept back with loose strands falling over the forehead
Klein Moretti.build: lean, slim but with defined shoulders
Klein Moretti.face_description: handsome young man with a sharp jawline, slightly narrowed confident brown eyes, strong brow ridge, straight nose, thin lips with a subtle smirk; refined scholarly features with a pale complexion and faint shadows under the eyes
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s pale young man with tousled black hair swept back, wearing a long black Victorian overcoat draped cape-style over shoulders revealing deep purple lining, dark waistcoat over white dress shirt with dark cravat/tie, brown leather cross-body holster strap with visible buckle, dark trousers
Klein Moretti.color_palette: black, deep purple, white, dark brown leather, charcoal gray
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; originally had brown eyes (not black); wears glasses as Zhou Mingrui; has eye bags and hint of double chin in original form; frequently shapeshifts into alternate identities (Sherlock Moriarty, Gehrman Sparrow, Dwayne Dantès, Merlin Hermes); Mythical Creature (formerly Human); resurrected 6 times
Klein Moretti.accessories: brown leather cross-body holster strap with metal buckle, long black overcoat worn cape-style with purple satin lining, dark cravat or narrow tie
Klein Moretti.faction: Tarot Club (Major Arcana) / Church of the Fool
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Mentioned wearing cheap formal attire, a tuxedo, a short-crowned top hat (half top hat style), and carrying a silver-inlaid black cane.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: long black Victorian overcoat (cape-draped with purple lining), dark charcoal waistcoat, white dress shirt, dark cravat/tie, brown leather cross-body holster strap, dark trousers
Klein Moretti.unique_identifier: always depicted with a long black overcoat draped cape-style revealing purple lining, brown leather cross-body holster strap; carries a silver chain with pure topaz pendulum in left sleeve; official image shows Chinese characters 克莱恩·莫雷蒂 (Klein Moretti)
Klein Moretti.wiki_source_notes: Image confirms: black hair, pale skin, purple-lined cape-style overcoat, brown leather cross-body strap, dark waistcoat over white shirt. Wiki corrects eye_color from black to brown (brown eyes confirmed in wiki appearance text and infobox lists both black and brown). Wiki adds full biographical details including species (Mythical Creature) and resurrection count. Current DB was largely accurate; main correction is eye color.

Man in Halved Top Hat.unique_identifier: always wears a black top hat split in half (halved top hat)
Man in Halved Top Hat.era_clothing_lock: black formal Victorian suit, crisp white collared shirt, black cravat, dark trousers, and polished leather shoes
Man in Halved Top Hat.face_description: weathered angular face with tired eyes and hair graying at the temples
Man in Halved Top Hat.visual_anchor: lanky older male with hair graying at the sides and a weathered face, always wearing a halved black top hat and a black formal Victorian suit
Man in Halved Top Hat.color_palette: deep black, charcoal grey, pale ivory
Man in Halved Top Hat.primary_clothing: black suit with halved top hat of the same color
Man in Halved Top Hat.distinguishing_features: refined bearing, purchasing Beyonder potion ingredients (cow teeth paeonol, white-edged sunflower petals, elf flowers — Spectator potion ingredients)
Man in Halved Top Hat.accessories: cane adorned with silver, gold-framed spectacles
Man in Halved Top Hat.source_notes: Chapter describes him wearing black suit, halved top hat, silver-adorned cane, gold-framed spectacles, pale yellow sideburns, refined bearing. Buying Spectator potion ingredients.

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.face_description: deeply recessed wrinkles at the edges of eyes and mouth, dark red pupils slightly turbid, hoary appearance
Old Neil.visual_anchor: Hoary 61-year-old elder in a classic black robe with deeply wrinkled face and turbid dark red eyes; round glasses in donghua adaptation.
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Deceased (corrupted by the Hidden Sage). Lives in a bungalow in North Borough suburbs; garden contains roses and gold mint; keeps a piano in memory of deceased fiancée Celeste. Known for being petty and stingy but fundamentally kind-hearted.
Old Neil.accessories: round felt hat; round glasses (donghua adaptation)
Old Neil.role: Mystery Pryer (Sequence 9, Hermit pathway); Clerk of Blackthorn Security Company
Old Neil.source_notes: Explicitly described his outfit in the chapter.
Old Neil.era_clothing_lock: classic black robe and felt black hat with a rounded edge
Old Neil.wiki_source_notes: Wiki infobox confirmed gender, hair (white), eyes (dark red), age 61. Appearance section confirmed classic black robe, deep wrinkles, turbid dark red pupils. Added full name Neil Townsend, round glasses from donghua, fiancée name Celeste, cause of death (Hidden Sage corruption), Hermit pathway detail, Blackthorn Security Company affiliation.

Benson Moretti.primary_clothing: linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.face_description: above-average looking, receding hairline, decrepit appearance, resembles Klein but lacks scholarly air
Benson Moretti.visual_anchor: mid-20s male with receding black hair, brown eyes, worn appearance beyond his years, wearing working-class Victorian attire, later transitioning to civil servant dress
Benson Moretti.distinguishing_features: hard-working and plainspoken, genial and polite, literate, nominal head of Moretti family, defers to siblings' opinions due to their higher education
Benson Moretti.role: Deputy Director at Ministry of Finance (former dockworker)
Benson Moretti.source_notes: Mentions his weekly salary (1 pound 10 soli) and his goal to study accountancy and grammar.
Benson Moretti.era_clothing_lock: linen shirt, black coat, halved top hat
Benson Moretti.wiki_source_notes: Wiki infobox confirmed gender, hair_color (black), eye_color (brown), age 25 at debut. Appearance section confirmed receding hairline, decrepit look, resemblance to Klein. Updated faction to Ministry of Finance and role to Deputy Director per current occupation. Added full_name. Personality section enriched distinguishing_features.

Melissa Moretti.skin_tone: pale, slightly thin-faced but with lustrous skin
Melissa Moretti.hair_style: long, reaching down her back; later tied up
Melissa Moretti.primary_clothing: grayish-white long dress that had been mended several times
Melissa Moretti.face_description: thin, slightly pale face with lustrous youthful skin; by 1352 her face filled out and lost its adolescent look; delicate features
Melissa Moretti.visual_anchor: Teenage girl with a thin, pale but lustrous face and black hair, wearing a simple dark skirt and blouse with a work apron, often carrying clockwork parts or a self-sewn school bag. Victorian-era attire in muted tones.
Melissa Moretti.color_palette: faded blue, grey, white, soft brown
Melissa Moretti.distinguishing_features: Frequently tinkers with gears, bearings, and springs; vocal advocate for women's education.
Melissa Moretti.faction: Tingen Technical School — Steam and Machinery department student
Melissa Moretti.source_notes: Added specific details about her mechanical hobbies and her reaction to the Shauds' traditionalist views.
Melissa Moretti.unique_identifier: frugal aspiring mechanical engineer; brown eyes with a habitual expression of calm exasperation; tattered inherited veil cap and self-sewn school bag
Melissa Moretti.wiki_source_notes: Wiki provided confirmed age progression (16→18→27), alias Zhou Sasa, detailed appearance evolution across years, and personality details (frugal, rational, aspiring mechanical engineer). Current DB was largely accurate; age_range expanded, build note added for 1352 change, face_description enriched from wiki text, full_name and codename added from infobox.

Evernight Goddess.hair_style: long flowing black hair with a dark veil/hood partially covering it
Evernight Goddess.face_description: partially obscured by dark veil, pale complexion visible on lower face, features hazy and ethereal as if veiled in shadow
Evernight Goddess.visual_anchor: ageless divine female shrouded in dark veil and hood, pale jade-like skin, long flowing black hair, wearing layered black classical dress embedded with sparkling star-like gem radiance resembling a night sky, holding a glowing crimson moon orb in both hands, black scythe held behind her, golden bird-shaped accessory hanging at her side, dark ornate armor-like pauldrons on shoulders
Evernight Goddess.color_palette: black, crimson red, silver, gold, deep blue-black
Evernight Goddess.distinguishing_features: Titles: Lady of Crimson, Mother of Concealment, Empress of Misfortune and Horror, Mistress of Repose and Silence. Six arms in war form (two hold black scythe, two hold crimson moon, one empty, one holds golden bird accessory). Full moon halo behind head. Dress embedded with starry gem-like radiance. Dark veil/hood obscuring face. Chinese text 黑夜女神 (Evernight Goddess) appears in official art.
Evernight Goddess.accessories: black scythe, crimson moon orb, golden bird-shaped accessory (chain/pendant at side), dark veil/hood, ornate dark shoulder armor/pauldrons, star-like gems embedded in dress
Evernight Goddess.source_notes: Old Neil explains the Goddess's titles and correspondences during the ritual in Chapter 51.
Evernight Goddess.era_clothing_lock: layered black classical dress with dark veil/hood, ornate dark pauldrons on shoulders, embedded with sparkling star-like gem radiance, not overly complex but deeply layered
Evernight Goddess.wiki_source_notes: Image shows war/divine form: dark veiled figure holding glowing crimson moon orb, black scythe behind her, golden bird accessory dangling at side, layered black dress with star-like sparkles, dark pauldrons. Wiki confirms layered black dress with gem radiance, six-arm war form details, hazy/blurry face. Updated visual_anchor and accessories to match image details (veil/hood, pauldrons, crimson orb held in hands).

Empress of Misfortune and Horror.unique_identifier: blood-red eyes that radiate a palpable sense of dread; ashen white wild hair cascading down like a shroud, unbound and tangled
Empress of Misfortune and Horror.era_clothing_lock: tattered deep crimson and black Victorian court gown with torn lace trim, frayed elbow-length black gloves, cracked leather boots barely visible beneath the gown's hem
Empress of Misfortune and Horror.face_description: Gaunt pale-grey oval face with sharp, skeletal cheekbones and a thin-lipped mouth set in a permanent grimace. Blood-red irises with no visible whites, framed by dark hollowed eye sockets.
Empress of Misfortune and Horror.visual_anchor: Ageless gaunt grey-skinned divine female with wild ashen white unbound hair and blood-red eyes radiating dread, wearing a tattered deep crimson and black Victorian court gown with frayed black lace
Empress of Misfortune and Horror.color_palette: deep crimson, ashen white, bone grey, absolute black
Empress of Misfortune and Horror.primary_clothing: tattered crimson and black Victorian court gown
Empress of Misfortune and Horror.distinguishing_features: blood-red eyes, wild unbound ashen hair, permanent aura of dread
Empress of Misfortune and Horror.accessories: frayed black lace trim, cracked black leather gloves
Empress of Misfortune and Horror.source_notes: Named as one of the seven gods. Domain is misfortune and horror. No physical description in text — appearance entirely guessed from her divine domain and Victorian-era aesthetic.

Lord of Storms.primary_clothing: robes woven from dark storm clouds and lightning
Lord of Storms.face_description: Stern, majestic face with a strong jawline, intense brow arch, and piercing eyes.
Lord of Storms.visual_anchor: ageless male, muscular build, wild dark blue hair, electric blue eyes, wearing robes of storm clouds and lightning
Lord of Storms.color_palette: storm black, dark blue, electric yellow, charcoal grey
Lord of Storms.faction: Church of the Lord of Storms
Lord of Storms.source_notes: Origin myth details provided by Dunn Smith.

Eternal Blazing Sun.primary_clothing: Radiant golden Victorian robes with sun-burst patterns and white lace
Eternal Blazing Sun.face_description: Perfectly symmetrical features with a glowing complexion and intense, radiating golden eyes.
Eternal Blazing Sun.visual_anchor: Eternal male deity, radiant golden skin and hair, golden eyes, wearing sun-patterned golden Victorian robes
Eternal Blazing Sun.color_palette: bright gold, brilliant white, saffron yellow
Eternal Blazing Sun.faction: Church of the Eternal Blazing Sun
Eternal Blazing Sun.source_notes: Deity mentioned in myth; appearance guessed based on title and name.

Earth Mother.primary_clothing: Flowing emerald and brown gown decorated with floral patterns and wheat stalks
Earth Mother.face_description: Warm and maternal face with soft features and eyes the color of a lush forest.
Earth Mother.visual_anchor: Maternal female deity, olive skin, long wavy brown hair with flower crown, wearing emerald green gown
Earth Mother.color_palette: emerald green, earth brown, wheat gold
Earth Mother.distinguishing_features: Appeared during the Third Epoch (Cataclysm Epoch).
Earth Mother.source_notes: Text explicitly mentions appearance in the Third Epoch.

God of Knowledge and Wisdom.primary_clothing: Deep blue scholar's robes with silver trim and numerous scrolls hanging from the belt
God of Knowledge and Wisdom.face_description: Wise, wrinkled face with a high forehead and sharp, discerning eyes behind spectacles.
God of Knowledge and Wisdom.visual_anchor: Elderly male deity, long white hair and beard, deep blue robes, holding an ancient book or scroll
God of Knowledge and Wisdom.distinguishing_features: Radiates an aura of calm intelligence
God of Knowledge and Wisdom.source_notes: Deity mentioned in myth; appearance guessed based on domain.
